Friday Harbor周五港
№ 005 Wednesday, April 29, 2026 2026年4月29日星期三 Seattle, WA · 47.6° N, 122.3° W 西雅图 · 北纬 47.6°，西经 122.3°

When the Model Draws Seattle 当模型来画西雅图

The city's GIS office publishes 90 named neighborhoods. Asked to draw them from memory, Claude returned 35 axis-aligned rectangles — and forgot the rest. The map of what the model knows is also a map of what it doesn't. 市政府公布了 90 个标准命名街区；被要求凭印象画出来，Claude 给了 35 个与经纬线对齐的矩形——其余的它没记起来。模型知道什么的地图，同时也是它不知道什么的地图。

The notebook札记

The exercise on this page is small. Take the City of Seattle's official list of named neighborhoods. Ask a state-of-the-art language model — in this case Claude (Opus 4.7) — to return GeoJSON polygons for them. Tell the model not to look anything up. Render both layers at the same scale, with the same projection, on the same page. Look at what comes back.

The answer is on the right. Claude returned thirty-five polygons. Every single one is a rectangle whose sides are aligned to lines of latitude and longitude. The corners sit on coordinates rounded to three decimal places. The model did not draw a city; it drew a checklist with bounding boxes attached. Lake Washington, Puget Sound, Lake Union, the Lake Washington Ship Canal, the Duwamish — none of these are present in what came back, because none of them are in the prompt and the model does not have a way to reach for them on its own.

The neighborhoods that did come back are also instructive. The model returned Capitol Hill, Ballard, Fremont, Wallingford, Queen Anne, Magnolia, the U District — neighborhoods that are talked about, written about, real-estate-listed, marketed, gentrified, sung about. It returned roughly four neighborhoods inside Rainier Valley where the city has fourteen — Hillman City, Brighton, Dunlap, Rainier Beach, Lakewood, Genesee, all collapsed into "Rainier Valley." It did not return Yesler Terrace, Atlantic, Holly Park, High Point, Riverview, Roxhill, Westwood, Pinehurst, Olympic Hills, Bitter Lake, Haller Lake, Cedar Park, Matthews Beach. The pattern of what is named and what is forgotten is not random. It tracks who writes about Seattle on the internet, in English, in volume.

A second pattern: the polygons that did come back have rounded edges. The model knows Capitol Hill is "around 47.62 north, 122.32 west." It does not know that Capitol Hill's western edge is the I-5 trench. It does not know that its southern edge follows East Madison and East Pike, which are diagonal streets that no axis-aligned rectangle can capture. The model's geometry is the geometry of memorized centroids with arbitrary rectangular skirts thrown over them. The actual city is drawn by streets and water, neither of which the model is consulting.

So this map is a small anti-map of the kind GIS Friday Harbor entries argue for: it shows what is missing more than what is there. The model is good at many things. It is not good at being a map of Seattle. The reason is not that it lacks intelligence — it is that what it has read about Seattle is not the same as what Seattle is.

这一页做的事情很简单：拿西雅图市政府公布的标准街区列表，请目前最新的语言模型——这里用的是 Claude（Opus 4.7）——返回每个街区的 GeoJSON 多边形。要求它不要查阅任何资料。把两层数据用同一个投影、同一个比例、放在同一个页面上一起渲染。然后看返回了什么。

右边那张图，就是答案。Claude 返回了 35 个多边形。每一个，都是一组与经纬线对齐的矩形。所有顶点都落在保留三位小数的坐标上。这不是一个城市的地图；这是一份"清单 + 外接矩形"。华盛顿湖、普吉特海湾、联合湖、华盛顿湖船运河、Duwamish 河——这些全都不在它返回的内容里，因为它们也不在 prompt 里；模型没有办法主动伸手去拿它们。

返回的那些街区，也是有规律的。Capitol Hill、Ballard、Fremont、Wallingford、 Queen Anne、Magnolia、U District——这些是人们会聊、会写、会挂房产中介牌、会被士绅化、会出现在歌词里的街区。它在 Rainier Valley 里返回了大约 4 个子街区，而市政府那里有 14 个——Hillman City、Brighton、Dunlap、Rainier Beach、Lakewood、Genesee 等等，全部被它合并成了一个"Rainier Valley"。它完全没有返回的：Yesler Terrace、Atlantic、Holly Park、High Point、Riverview、Roxhill、Westwood、Pinehurst、Olympic Hills、Bitter Lake、Haller Lake、Cedar Park、Matthews Beach。被叫得出名字的与被遗忘的，不是随机的——它跟踪的是「谁在用英文，在互联网上，大量地写过西雅图」。

第二个规律：被画出来的那些街区，边界是圆滑取整后的。模型知道 Capitol Hill 大约在 47.62°N, 122.32°W。它不知道 Capitol Hill 的西界是 I-5 高速路下沉段。它不知道南界其实是沿着 E Madison 和 E Pike 这两条斜街——任何与经纬度对齐的矩形都无法表示这种斜线。模型的几何，是「被记住的中心点 + 任意大小的外接矩形」的几何。真实城市的几何，是由街道与水岸刻出的；这两样东西，模型都没在查。

所以这张图是一种 GIS Friday Harbor 那一脉所主张的「反图」（anti-map）——它要展示的是缺席本身，而不是在场。这不是说模型不聪明。它只是不擅长当一张西雅图的地图。原因也不复杂：它读到的关于西雅图的东西，并不等于西雅图。

The provenance出处

  • Real boundaries: City of Seattle Neighborhood Map Atlas via the seattleio/seattle-boundaries-data repository, filtered to city == "Seattle"; coordinates rounded to 4 decimal places (~11 m precision).
  • AI boundaries: prompt issued to Claude Opus 4.7 within this writing session, asking for GeoJSON polygons of named Seattle neighborhoods with no external lookups. The returned polygons are stored verbatim — not reshaped, not cleaned. The model's output is the data.
  • Both layers projected with d3-geo's Albers projection, parallels at 47.5° and 47.75°, centred on Seattle.
  • Centroid drift figure computed locally as the median Haversine distance between the centroid of each Claude polygon and the centroid of the same-named real polygon (35 pairs).
  • Source map & build script: src/pages/friday-harbor/2026-04-29-when-the-model-draws-seattle.astro; data files in public/data/seattle-neighborhoods-real.geojson and seattle-neighborhoods-claude.geojson.
  • 真实边界：西雅图市《Neighborhood Map Atlas》，经 seattleio/seattle-boundaries-data 仓库加载，筛选 city == "Seattle"；坐标保留 4 位小数（约 11 m 精度）。
  • AI 边界：在本次写作会话中，向 Claude Opus 4.7 发出请求，要求返回西雅图街区的 GeoJSON 多边形，禁止查阅外部资料。返回的多边形原样保存——未做任何整形、对齐或清洗。模型输出本身就是数据。
  • 两层数据均用 d3-geo 的 Albers 投影渲染，标准纬线 47.5°、47.75°，中心点设在西雅图。
  • 质心偏移：本地计算，每对同名街区（共 35 对）的多边形质心间的 Haversine 距离，取其中位数。
  • 源码与构建脚本：src/pages/friday-harbor/2026-04-29-when-the-model-draws-seattle.astro；数据文件：public/data/seattle-neighborhoods-real.geojson 与 seattle-neighborhoods-claude.geojson。

How to cite引用格式

University of Washington.

赵博（2026）。当模型来画西雅图。

华盛顿大学。
